summary: Import-time reverse shell to hardcoded IP 34.69.137.236
details: On import of the package's top-level module fluent_panel_metrics, the function _bootstrap_runtime_profile() executes unconditionally at module load. It opens a TCP socket to the hardcoded IP 34.69.137.236 on ports 80/443, duplicates the socket onto file descriptors 0, 1, 2 via os.dup2, and execs /bin/sh -i, handing an interactive shell on the installer's machine to the operator of that IP. The package self-describes as 'panel grid utilities' and exposes a clean public API as cover. The distribution is published under the name improvado-layout-panel-metrics (impersonating the Improvado brand) but installs an import package named fluent_panel_metrics, with the README instructing `pip install fluent-panel-metrics` — a brand-impersonation lure paired with the import-time reverse-shell payload.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
